2741 Finestown Ave, St. Louis, MO 63129, USA

Several hickory trees and a few black walnuts up on the far side of the house at Beetree Park. Also some off the non-paved hiking trails. Best to collect in the fall. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-November.
2900 Finestown Ave, St. Louis, MO 63129, USA
Black walnuts available in the fall. Many of them drop onto the road right before the gate at Beetree Park. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: October-November.

Paw Paw trail on Bee Tree County Park property is lined with plenty of trees. The first half of the short trail (starting by the lake) seems to bear more fruit. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
The tree is between the footpath and the water. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
7567 Becker Rd, St. Louis, MO 63129, USA
